info.title: dotnet-linux-cert
info.description: Dotnet linux cert helper: Install and list PKCS#12 certificates for *nix system

hookCapture.patchTarget: Parse-postfix (OK: ArgumentExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Parse, OK: OptionExtensions.Parse, OK: Parser.Parse, OK: ParserExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Invoke, OK: CommandExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParseResultExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParserExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParserExtensions.Invoke, OK: CommandExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: CommandExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParseResultExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParserExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParserExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ModelBindingCommandHandler.InvokeAsync, OK: RootCommand.ctor(String))

commands.name: install
commands.description: Install certificates, optionally with password supplied

options.name: store-name
options.description: Specify store name, available value: [AddressBook AuthRoot CertificateAuthority Disallowed My Root TrustedPeople TrustedPublisher]

options.name: store-location
options.description: Specify store location, available value: [CurrentUser LocalMachine]

commands.name: auto-install
commands.description: Auto install certificates (with .txt pairs) from path specified

options.name: store-name
options.description: Specify store name, available value: [AddressBook AuthRoot CertificateAuthority Disallowed My Root TrustedPeople TrustedPublisher]

options.name: store-location
options.description: Specify store location, available value: [CurrentUser LocalMachine]

commands.name: autoInstallCerts
commands.description: Auto install certificates (with .txt pairs) from path specified

commands.name: list
commands.description: List certificates, can be filtered by store name or location

options.name: store-name
options.description: Specify store name, available value: [AddressBook AuthRoot CertificateAuthority Disallowed My Root TrustedPeople TrustedPublisher]

options.name: store-location
options.description: Specify store location, available value: [CurrentUser LocalMachine]
